(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT FOUND THAT NOTICE HAD BEEN GIVEN AS REQUIRED BY LAW. THE COURT AWARDED SOLE LEGAL AND PHYS
ICAL CUSTODY TO THE PETITIONER. THERE SHALL BE NO VISITATION PENDING A MOTION FROM RESPONDENT FOR MEDIATION AT FAMILY COURT SERVICES AND AN ORDER
ND FURNITURE AS WELL CUSTODY AND CONTROL OF THE 1996 HONDA. THE COURT ORDERED CHILD SUPPORT PAID AT THE RATE OF $345.00 EFFECTIVE APRIL 3, 1998.
